title: Rechargeable Emergency LED Light
description: Stay prepared during unexpected power cuts. A rechargeable LED light provides bright illumination for studying, cooking, or moving around safely without relying on candles.
group: Problem: Power Cuts During Heavy Rain

title: Rechargeable LED Bulb
description: Works like a regular bulb but automatically provides light during power outages. Ideal for rented homes where you can't install backup power systems.
group: Problem: Power Cuts During Heavy Rain

title: Rechargeable Table Lamp
description: Perfect for students who need uninterrupted lighting while studying during rainy evenings or electricity cuts.
group: Problem: Power Cuts During Heavy Rain

title: Power Bank (10000mAh or above)
description: Keep your phone charged during long outages so you can stay connected, attend online classes, or contact family in emergencies.
group: Problem: Power Cuts During Heavy Rain

title: Door Bottom Seal Strip
description: Helps reduce rainwater, dust, insects, and cold air from entering through the gap beneath your door without damaging the door.
group: Problem: Rainwater Enters Through Doors & Windows

title: Self-Adhesive Weather Stripping Tape
description: Seal small gaps around windows to reduce water leakage, wind, and outside moisture during heavy rain.
group: Problem: Rainwater Enters Through Doors & Windows

title: Waterproof Window Seal Tape
description: Provides an extra layer of protection for windows that leak during monsoon. Easy to remove without damaging rental properties.
group: Problem: Rainwater Enters Through Doors & Windows

title: Super Absorbent Floor Mat
description: Absorbs water quickly near the entrance to prevent slippery floors and muddy footprints.
group: Problem: Rainwater Enters Through Doors & Windows

title: Moisture Absorber
description: Reduces excess humidity inside small rooms, helping walls, wardrobes, and furniture stay drier.

title: Portable Mini Dehumidifier
description: Removes moisture from the air, making small rooms feel less damp while helping reduce mold-friendly conditions.

title: Activated Charcoal Moisture Bags
description: Naturally absorb excess moisture and odors inside wardrobes, cupboards, and corners prone to humidity.

title: Waterproof Furniture Covers
description: Protect mattresses, sofas, and wooden furniture from accidental leaks or excessive moisture.

title: Mattress Protector
description: Adds a protective barrier against moisture, helping keep your mattress fresh during humid weather.

title: Wardrobe Moisture Absorber
description: Keeps wardrobes dry and helps prevent unpleasant odors on clothes during the rainy season.

title: Bamboo Charcoal Air Purifying Bags
description: Naturally absorb odors without using perfumes or chemicals.

title: Fabric Refresher Spray
description: Freshens curtains, cushions, and upholstery that may develop damp smells during humid weather.

title: Magnetic Mosquito Net for Windows
description: Lets fresh air in while helping keep mosquitoes and flying insects outside. Easy to install without drilling.

title: Door Draft Stopper
description: Blocks small gaps under doors where insects, cockroaches, and mosquitoes often enter.

title: Insect Screen Repair Tape
description: Quickly patch small tears in mesh screens to keep insects from getting inside.

title: Foldable Indoor Drying Rack
description: Dry clothes indoors without taking up much floor space—perfect for hostels and PG rooms.

title: Stainless Steel Cloth Clips
description: Rust-resistant clips that securely hold clothes, even in windy or humid conditions.

title: Portable Clothesline
description: Create an instant drying area inside your room or bathroom without drilling holes.

title: Clothes Drying hanger
description: Dry delicate clothes flat to help them retain their shape while drying faster.

title: Shoe Rack
description: Keep muddy footwear organized and prevent dirty floors.

title: Shoe Drying Bags
description: Help absorb moisture inside shoes and reduce unpleasant odors.

title: Waterproof Boot Tray
description: Collects dripping water from shoes and umbrellas to keep your floor clean.

title: Shoe Deodorizer
description: Keeps footwear smelling fresh between rainy commutes.

title: Foldable Umbrella Stand
description: Store wet umbrellas neatly without dripping water across the room.

title: Waterproof Umbrella Storage Bag
description: Carry a wet umbrella inside your backpack without soaking your belongings.

title: Under-Bed Storage Bags
description: Store extra clothes, blankets, and bedding while protecting them from dust and humidity.

title: Vacuum Storage Bags
description: Save space and keep seasonal clothes protected from moisture.

title: Stackable Plastic Storage Boxes
description: Protect books, documents, and electronics from damp conditions.

title: Anti-Slip Bath Mat
description: Provides extra grip on wet floors, helping reduce the risk of slips after showers.

title: Quick-Dry Microfiber Towel
description: Dries faster than cotton towels, making it a practical choice for humid weather.

title: Rechargeable Study Lamp
description: Continue studying even during power cuts with adjustable brightness and long battery life.

title: Laptop Stand
description: Improves posture and keeps your workspace comfortable for long study sessions.

title: Cable Organizer
description: Keep charging cables, earphones, and accessories tidy in compact spaces.

title: Waterproof Document Organizer
description: Protect important certificates, passports, and paperwork from accidental water damage.

title: Waterproof Laptop Sleeve
description: Adds an extra layer of protection while commuting in the rain.

title: Waterproof Backpack Cover
description: Keeps your backpack and electronics dry during sudden downpours.
group: Problem: Your Phone or Laptop Gets Wet

title: Warm LED Fairy Lights
description: Create a warm and relaxing atmosphere in your room while using very little electricity.
group: Problem: No Cozy Vibe on Rainy Days

title: Soft Throw Blanket
description: Stay comfortable during cool, rainy evenings.
group: Problem: No Cozy Vibe on Rainy Days

title: Scented Candle or Wax Melts (where permitted)
description: Add a cozy touch to your room after rainy days. If your PG or hostel prohibits open flames, choose flameless wax warmers or reed diffusers instead.

title: First Aid Kit
description: Keep basic medical supplies ready for minor cuts, slips, or emergencies.

title: Rechargeable Flashlight
description: Useful during nighttime power cuts or emergency situations.

title: Waterproof Zip Lock Storage Bags
description: Protect chargers, gadgets, cash, and important papers from unexpected rainwater.

title: Extension Board with Surge Protection
description: Safely power multiple devices while helping protect electronics from voltage fluctuations during storms.
